name: read_file
description: Read file contents by specified path. Works only within the project workspace.

path.description: Relative path to the file in the project workspace

max_lines.description: Maximum number of lines to read (0 = unlimited)

name: write_file
description: Create a new file or completely overwrite an existing one. Path must be within the project workspace.

path.description: Relative path to the file in the project workspace

content.description: Content to write to the file

name: edit_file
description: Point editing of a file: find and replace text or insert at a specified position.

path.description: Relative path to the file in the project workspace

old_text.description: Text to search for (first occurrence will be replaced)

insert_line.description: Line number for insertion (if not using old_text/new_text)

insert_text.description: Text to insert at the specified line

name: list_files
description: Get the structure of files and folders in the specified project directory.

path.description: Relative path to the directory (defaults to workspace root)

name: search_code
description: Search file contents using regular expressions.

path.description: Directory to search (defaults to entire workspace)

name: delete_file
description: Delete a file from the project workspace. Does not support directory deletion.

path.description: Relative path to the file to delete

name: mkdir
description: Create a new directory in the project workspace. Can create parent directories if needed.

path.description: Relative path to the directory to create

parents.description: Create parent directories if they don't exist

name: move
description: Move or rename a file or directory within the project workspace.
